Next, check the final coverage plan: It contains health_coverage (with both physical and mental health specified along with costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with details and costs), travel_coverage (details and costs), additional_services (present but empty — not fully specified), and total_budget (complete monthly/annual breakdown). Now, verify if each is fully specified: health_coverage — yes, with physical and mental components and costs; property_coverage — yes, with plan, details, and costs; travel_coverage — yes, with details and costs; additional_services — no, it's empty rather than providing any enhancement services with costs; total_budget — yes, fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.
